prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在 2025 年已回升至正常中枢 7431 名、2026 年大幅扩招 13% 但本省考生同步增长 8.4%、抖音高热反映关注度上升、优势学科与热门专业高度契合等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次；预测最低位次约 8060 名，区间 7560–8560 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 7267→7690→7721→13129→7431. From 2021 to 2023, they stabilized in the 7267–7721 range. In 2024, due to subject group adjustments, there was an abnormal drop to 13129, but in 2025 it quickly recovered to 7431, returning to normal levels. Over the past 5 years, overall fluctuations have been large but the center is around 7400–7700, with a 2025 baseline of about 7431. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province was 498 in 2021, 664 in 2022, 664 in 2023, 784 in 2024, and 824 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 931, an increase of about 13% over 2025, significantly increasing enrollment slots, which helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking: 32nd in 2021, 32nd in 2022, 29th in 2023, 32nd in 2024, 29th in 2025, and 31st in 2026, consistently in the top 35 nationally, with strong comprehensive strength. In 2026 reputation evaluation data, Hunan University had no significant negative incidents, maintaining stable overall reputation. On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranking is 16th (rated 'high heat'), with high short video exposure, reflecting increasing attention from applicants. In recent years, there have been no records of admission cutoff line gaps or sharp drops, indicating stable application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 8 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Civil Engineering A-, Applied Economics A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, and Computer Science and Technology A-, with balanced development in engineering and management disciplines, strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are consistently highly recommended with social heat, highly matching the university's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 405 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 476 points. In recent years, provincial control lines have been stable with a slight decline, but ranking competition remains fierce. Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, and is the only 985 university directly under the Ministry of Education in the province. It has a high proportion of enrollment within the province (824 in Physics Category in 2025, accounting for a large portion of the national plan), with strong willingness among local examinees to apply, showing significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that historical rankings have recovered to the normal center of 7431 in 2025, a significant 13% enrollment expansion in 2026 but an 8.4% increase in local examinees, high Douyin heat reflecting rising attention, and strong alignment between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 8060, with a range of 7560–8560.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 8060, with a range of 7560–8560. For rankings at the lower end of the range (within 7560), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship popular majors like Electrical, Computer, and Electronic Information. For rankings in the middle of the range (around 8060), it is recommended to target Tier 2 majors such as Intelligent Manufacturing, Communication, and Microelectronics as the main direction, while also considering borderline Tier 1 majors. For rankings near the upper end of the range (around 8560), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors like Chemistry and Civil Engineering, which have strong discipline evaluations, as safety options, while also paying attention to relatively lower-ranking majors in Tier 2. The university has outstanding engineering strength with many A-level disciplines, so it is advisable to combine personal interests with industry prospects for comprehensive selection.
